calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Inna Astrakhantseva (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the time is 2:15 p.m. and Nedra Lee Franklin (Respondent) is not present and that she was served on December 13, 2012. The Court hears testimony, receives evidence from the Petitioner and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's request is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Inna Astrakhantseva and the Respondent shall stay 3 yards away from the protected person while at 1750 McAllister Street. Move-Out Order is not granted.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: January 2, 2016.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
